name: Meringue Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat egg whites, salt, and cream of tartar in a large bowl until stiff peaks form.
2. Gradually add sugar while continuing to beat the mixture until glossy and thick.
3. Gently fold in the chocolate chips until evenly distributed.
4. Line an ungreased baking sheet with parchment paper or place a brown grocery bag on a regular cookie sheet for airiness.
5. Drop spoonfuls of batter onto the prepared sheet, spacing them about 2 inches apart.
6. Bake at 300°F (150°C) for 25 minutes, or until lightly browned and crisp.
7. Allow cookies to cool completely before removing from the baking sheet.
WARNING: This recipe is sensitive to temperature control. If baked too hot, they may burn quickly. Remove from heat immediately if overbaked.
